unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
/* protocol-specific functions set up to be called by the main engine */
unit.function_decl: static CURLcode rtsp_done(struct Curl_easy *data, CURLcode, bool premature);
static CURLcode rtsp_disconnect(struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, bool dead);
static int rtsp_getsock_do(struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, curl_socket_t *socks);
unit.comment: /* * Parse and write out an RTSP response. * @param data the transfer * @param conn the connection * @param buf data read from connection * @param blen amount of data in buf * @param is_eos TRUE iff this is the last write * @param readmore out, TRUE iff complete buf was consumed and more data * is needed */
unit.function_decl: static CURLcode rtsp_setup_connection(struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn);

function.name: rtsp_getsock_do

unit.function_decl: static CURLcode rtp_client_write(struct Curl_easy *data, const char *ptr, size_t len);
unit.decl_stmt: const struct Curl_handler Curl_handler_rtsp = { "RTSP", /* scheme */ rtsp_setup_connection, /* setup_connection */ rtsp_do, /* do_it */ rtsp_done, /* done */ ZERO_NULL, /* do_more */ rtsp_connect, /* connect_it */ ZERO_NULL, /* connecting */ ZERO_NULL, /* doing */ ZERO_NULL, /* proto_getsock */ rtsp_getsock_do, /* doing_getsock */ ZERO_NULL, /* domore_getsock */ ZERO_NULL, /* perform_getsock */ rtsp_disconnect, /* disconnect */ rtsp_rtp_write_resp, /* write_resp */ rtsp_conncheck, /* connection_check */ ZERO_NULL, /* attach connection */ PORT_RTSP, /* defport */ CURLPROTO_RTSP, /* protocol */ CURLPROTO_RTSP, /* family */ PROTOPT_NONE /* flags */ };

function.name: rtsp_setup_connection
rtsp_conncheck
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, unsigned int checks_to_perform)

function.name: rtsp_connect
rtsp_done
rtsp_do
rtp_write_body_junk
rtsp_filter_rtp
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *pconsumed)

function.name: rtsp_rtp_write_resp
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *buf, size_t blen, bool is_eos)

function.name: rtp_client_write
Curl_rtsp_parseheader
rtsp_parse_transport
